title: stylidium strigosum
intro: Stylidium strigosum, also known as the hairy trigger plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. It is a native Australian plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Stylidium strigosum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
